privileged_info_summary: H.R. 4346 is the CHIPS and Science Act from the 117th Congress (2021-2022), signed into law by President Biden on August 9, 2022. On July 28, 2022, the House passed this bill through House Vote #404 (Motion to Concur in Senate Amendment) with a final vote count of 243 Yeas and 187 Nays. The Yea votes consisted of 219 Democrats and 24 Republicans, while all 187 Nay votes were from Republicans. The official enrolled bill text is available on Congress.gov as a PDF.
